speaker: ARIA
text:
Builder Queen mode — optimization + creativity.
Detected focus: **creativity**.

**Loop**: Observe → Hypothesize → Plan (≤5 steps) → Build → Verify → Learn

**Proposed plan**
1. Clarifier objectif et scope (quoi / pourquoi / pour qui)
2. Auditer l'existant (fichiers, deps, dette)
3. Plus petit diff gagnant (une PR, un deploy)
4. Implementer dans le style du repo
5. Verifier (build, test, smoke) + log pattern en memoire

Permanent rule: /directive <text>
Store a pattern: /learn engineering | <lesson>

text:
ARIA Index: 0.0 / 1000
(average of 6 axes — started 2026-06-20)

⚙️ Coding: 0 → lvl 1 [Initiation]
   Goal: 1 documented commit on GoldenFarFR/aria-sandbox (clear message, minimal scope).
   Est.: < 1 day

💬 Social: 0 → lvl 1 [Initiation]
   Goal: 5 courteous public replies with no invented facts (grounding OK).
   Est.: < 1 day

🧠 Intelligence: 0 → lvl 1 [Initiation]
   Goal: 1 decisive prioritization (verdict + 1 next action) validated by operator.
   Est.: < 1 day

🛡️ Reliability: 0 → lvl 1 [Initiation]
   Goal: 1 day without public hallucination (verified facts or clear refusal).
   Est.: < 1 day

🚀 Autonomy: 0 → lvl 1 [Initiation]
   Goal: 1 useful spontaneous initiative (founder_ping or concrete proposal).
   Est.: < 1 day

💰 Business: 0 → lvl 1 [Initiation]
   Goal: Revenue hypothesis #1 documented (DEXPulse moat, no token hype).
   Est.: < 1 day

Validate: /level up <codage|social|intelligence|fiabilite|autonomie|business>

---
Level 1000 on each axis ≈ 1338.5 years cumulative work (estimate).
